expectations.evidence: Report titled 'Security & Test Coverage' and covers only those two areas. No code quality, architecture, or UX sections. However, some security findings overlap with general code quality (S-07 bare except). Overall scoped correctly.

13 security findings (S-01 to S-16, including INFO items) with file paths and line numbers. Organized by sub-category (Credential Exposure, Input Validation, File System Security, Configuration Security, .gitignore, Timestamp Data Leakage).
Comprehensive test coverage assessment. Identifies zero tests, recommends 37 tests across 3 priority tiers, estimates 6 hours effort. Function-level breakdown with test case counts.
